prestazioni: 4G63T (7-bolt) forged internals upgrade with Manley 87mm forged crankshaft, Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and JE 8.5:1 compression forged pistons for 35 psi boost capability, paired with a Garrett GTX3582R Gen II turbocharger (0.82 A/R turbine housing, 62mm compressor inducer) and custom 3.5" V-band downpipe with Vibrant 1799 high-flow catalytic converter

Haltech Elite 2500 standalone ECU with custom 4D ignition and fuel maps optimized for E85 flex-fuel, integrated with AEM 30-0300 X-Series wideband O2 sensor and dual Bosch 0280158002 1000cc/min high-impedance injectors (dead-time calibrated via MoTeC M1 tuning suite)

Full drivetrain reinforcement including Cusco 2-way LSD (250Nm torque capacity) with 3.90:1 final drive ratio, PTT 3.5" aluminum driveshaft, and Competition Clutch twin-disc carbon-metallic clutch (280 ft-lb torque rating) with billet flywheel, mated to a Getrag F5M420 5-speed transmission with Synchrotech 2nd/3rd gear synchro upgrade
estetica: Veilside Fortune 99 widebody conversion kit (fiberglass front fenders, carbon fiber rear quarter panels) with custom 3M Matte Graphite vinyl wrap and JDM-spec Mitsubishi Ralliart rear spoiler (OEM part # MR433512) in gloss black

Work Meister S1 3P 18x9.5 +22 front / 18x10.5 +30 rear wheels (ET22/ET30) with Toyo R888R 245/40/18 and 275/35/18 tires, paired with D2 Racing coilovers (32-way adjustable damping, 8kg/mm front / 10kg/mm rear springs) and Cusco front strut bar (22mm hollow steel)

Full JDM Eclipse Spyder-specific aero package including C-West front bumper lip (OEM-style fog light delete), custom carbon fiber side skirts with integrated LED turn signals, and custom rear diffuser with dual 3.5" titanium exhaust tips (custom-fabricated by Burns Stainless) exiting through the OEM valance
